title: tilia americana var. neglecta
intro: Tilia americana var. neglecta, also known as American linden or small-leaved linden, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Tilia americana var. neglecta include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress levels. Tilia americana var. neglecta can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
